tracks.rawText: 5:38Traffik and Van Dam - Nou Tout Fou - Knaval 2015 [186806819]UploadHaitian Compas and Rabòday fusion with heavy political hip-hop influence, The track features a driving electronic percussion section with a prominent kick on every beat and syncopated snare patterns, A bright, rhythmic electric guitar plays repetitive staccato riffs, The bassline is synth-driven, providing a deep, percussive low end, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, chanting style with call-and-response sections, Brass stabs and synthesized horn sections punctuate the transitions, The tempo is 125 BPM in the key of G minor, High-energy transitions are marked by rapid drum fills and vocal ad-libs2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Traffik and Van Dam - Nou Tout Fou - Knaval 2015 [186806819]

tracks.rawText: 2:36SEVDALIZA - RIDE OR DIE PTUploadFuture Bass and Reggaeton fusion, The track features a dual-language vocal performance with a male tenor in English and a female soprano in Spanish, Instrumentation consists of a heavy sub-bass, syncopated dembow percussion patterns, and bright, side-chained synth chords that swell on the off-beats, A prominent distorted lead synth riff with a high-frequency buzz defines the drop sections, The arrangement utilizes vocal chops, riser effects, and sudden rhythmic stops, Key: G minor, Tempo: 100 BPM, Time signature: 4/42PublishRemix
tracks.title: SEVDALIZA - RIDE OR DIE PT

tracks.rawText: 4:23Burn Me Beautifulv5.5soulful r b ballad inspired by R&B, Soul, Pop, Hip Hop emotional piano chords live drums gospel choir harmonies jazzy electric bass and warm analog tone strong soulful female vocals full of emotion and power a mix between fallin and girl on fire singing about inner strength rebirth and love dynamic cinematic energy uplifting outro with choir and stringsAliciake1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:55Burn Me Beautifulv5.5Dark pop with brooding minor-key synth pads, dry punchy kick, snare snapped through gated reverb, and a deep sidechained sub-bass, Staccato piano, detuned bell plucks, filtered noise risers, and glossy vocal layers with plate reverb, delay throws, and hard-panned doubles, Each bar accents a downbeat vocal hitPublishRemix
